messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Compute Engine to OCI Compute migration.
Como migrar instâncias GCP Compute Engine para OCI Compute?

Para migrar GCP Compute Engine para OCI Compute:

**Pré-requisitos:**
1. Criar VCN com subnets no OCI
2. Configurar IAM policies para Compute
3. Preparar imagens GCP para exportação

**Método 1: Exportar imagem GCP e importar no OCI**
```
# 1. Criar imagem da instância GCP
gcloud compute images create minha-imagem-migracao \
  --source-disk minha-vm \
  --source-disk-zone us-central1-a \
  --family migrated

# 2. Exportar para Cloud Storage
gcloud compute images export \
  --image minha-imagem-migracao \
  --destination-uri gs://meu-bucket-export/minha-vm.tar.gz \
  --export-format qcow2

# 3. Download do GCS
gsutil cp gs://meu-bucket-export/minha-vm.tar.gz ./

# 4. Upload para OCI Object Storage
oci os object put \
  --bucket-name migration-bucket \
  --name minha-vm.qcow2 \
  --file ./minha-vm.tar.gz

# 5. Importar como custom image no OCI
oci compute image import \
  --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleID \
  --display-name "gcp-migrated-vm" \
  --source-image-type QCOW2 \
  --launch-mode PARAVIRTUALIZED \
  --source-uri "https://objectstorage.us-ashburn-1.oraclecloud.com/n/<namespace>/b/migration-bucket/o/minha-vm.qcow2"

# 6. Criar instância OCI
oci compute instance launch \
  --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleID \
  --shape VM.Standard.E4.Flex \
  --source-details '{"sourceType": "image", "imageId": "ocid1.image.oc1..exampleID"}'
```

**Mapeamento GCP → OCI:**
- GCP Machine Type → OCI Shape
- GCP Persistent Disk → OCI Block Volume
- GCP VPC → OCI VCN
- GCP Firewall Rules → OCI Security Lists

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Compute Engine to OCI Compute migration.
Como mapear GCP machine types para OCI shapes equivalentes?

Mapeamento de GCP machine types para OCI shapes:

**General Purpose (N2/E2):**
| GCP | OCI Shape | OCPU | Memory (GB) |
|-----|-----------|------|-------------|
| e2-micro | VM.Standard.E4.Flex | 1 | 1 |
| e2-small | VM.Standard.E4.Flex | 1 | 2 |
| e2-medium | VM.Standard.E4.Flex | 2 | 4 |
| n2-standard-2 | VM.Standard.E4.Flex | 2 | 8 |
| n2-standard-4 | VM.Standard.E4.Flex | 4 | 16 |
| n2-standard-8 | VM.Standard.E4.Flex | 8 | 32 |
| n2-standard-16 | VM.Standard.E4.Flex | 16 | 64 |

**Compute Optimized (C2):**
| GCP | OCI Shape | OCPU | Memory (GB) |
|-----|-----------|------|-------------|
| c2-standard-4 | VM.Standard.E4.Flex | 4 | 16 |
| c2-standard-8 | VM.Standard.E4.Flex | 8 | 32 |
| c2-standard-16 | VM.Standard.E4.Flex | 16 | 64 |

**Memory Optimized (M2):**
| GCP | OCI Shape | OCPU | Memory (GB) |
|-----|-----------|------|-------------|
| m2-ultramem-416 | BM.Standard3 | 416 | 5888 |

**ARM (T2A):**
| GCP | OCI Shape | OCPU | Memory (GB) |
|-----|-----------|------|-------------|
| t2a-standard-2 | VM.Standard.A1.Flex | 2 | 4 |
| t2a-standard-4 | VM.Standard.A1.Flex | 4 | 8 |

**OCI Flex Shapes:**
```
oci compute instance launch \
  --shape VM.Standard.E4.Flex \
  --shape-config '{"ocpus": 4, "memoryInGBs": 16}'
```

**Notas:**
- OCI Flex shapes permitem ajustar OCPU e memory independentemente
- GCP shared-core (f1-micro, g1-small) não têm equivalente direto
- [MUTABLE] Preços variam por região

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/References/computeshapes.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Compute Engine to OCI Compute migration.
Como migrar persistent disks do GCP para OCI Block Volumes?

Para migrar GCP Persistent Disks para OCI Block Volumes:

**1. Criar snapshot do Persistent Disk:**
```
gcloud compute disks snapshot meu-disk \
  --snapshot-names meu-disk-snapshot \
  --zone us-central1-a
```

**2. Exportar snapshot como imagem:**
```
gcloud compute images create exported-disk \
  --source-snapshot meu-disk-snapshot \
  --storage-location us

# Exportar para Cloud Storage
gcloud compute images export \
  --image exported-disk \
  --destination-uri gs://meu-bucket-export/disk.qcow2 \
  --export-format qcow2
```

**3. Download e upload para OCI:**
```
gsutil cp gs://meu-bucket-export/disk.qcow2 ./

oci os object put \
  --bucket-name migration-bucket \
  --name migrated-disk.qcow2 \
  --file ./disk.qcow2
```

**4. Criar Block Volume no OCI:**
```
oci bv volume create \
  --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleID \
  --availability-domain AD-1 \
  --display-name "migrated-gcp-disk" \
  --size-in-gbs 100 \
  --source-details '{
    "type": "objectStorageTuple",
    "namespaceName": "<namespace>",
    "bucketName": "migration-bucket",
    "objectName": "migrated-disk.qcow2"
  }'
```

**5. Attach à instância:**
```
oci compute volume-attachment attach \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.oc1..exampleID \
  --volume-id ocid1.volume.oc1..exampleID \
  --type paravirtualized
```

**6. Montar na instância:**
```
lsblk
sudo mount /dev/sdb1 /mnt/data
```

**Considerações:**
- QCOW2 é formato compatível com OCI
- Use paravirtualized attach para melhor performance
- OCI Block Volumes suportam até 32TB [CHECK DOCS]
- Performance: VPUs configuráveis [MUTABLE]

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Block/Tasks/cloningablockvolume.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Compute Engine to OCI Compute migration.
Como resolver incompatibilidade de imagens ao migrar GCP para OCI?

Incompatibilidades de imagens GCP → OCI:

**Problemas comuns:**

**1. Formato incompatível:**
GCP usa tar.gz com disk.raw. OCI suporta QCOW2, VMDK, VDI.
```
# Converter para QCOW2
gcloud compute images export \
  --image minha-imagem \
  --destination-uri gs://bucket/disk.qcow2 \
  --export-format qcow2
```

**2. Drivers VirtIO faltando:**
OCI requer drivers VirtIO.
```
# Verificar na VM GCP antes de exportar
lsmod | grep virtio

# Instalar se necessário
sudo apt-get install -y cloud-init cloud-utils
echo "datasource_list: [ GCE, ConfigDrive ]" | sudo tee /etc/cloud/cloud.cfg.d/99-oracle.cfg
```

**3. Boot mode:**
```
# OCI suporta UEFI e BIOS
# Verificar boot mode da imagem GCP
gcloud compute images describe minha-imagem \
  --format="value(architecture)"

# Ao importar no OCI
oci compute image import \
  --launch-mode PARAVIRTUALIZED \
  --source-image-type QCOW2
```

**4. cloud-init não configurado:**
```
# Instalar cloud-init
sudo apt-get install -y cloud-init
sudo dpkg-reconfigure cloud-init

# Verificar logs pós-migração
cat /var/log/cloud-init.log
cat /var/log/cloud-init-output.log
```

**5. Kernel incompatível:**
```
# Verificar kernel
uname -r
lsmod | grep virtio_blk
lsmod | grep virtio_net

# Se drivers faltando
sudo modprobe virtio_blk
sudo modprobe virtio_net
```

**Se a VM não bootar:**
1. Criar instância de recovery
2. Attach boot volume como data volume
3. Mount e verificar:
```
sudo mount /dev/sdb1 /mnt/recovery
cat /mnt/recovery/var/log/boot.log
cat /mnt/recovery/etc/fstab
```

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/preparingimage.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Compute Engine to OCI Compute migration.
Como migrar GCP instance groups para instance pools no OCI?

GCP Managed Instance Groups → OCI Instance Pools:

**Conceitos equivalentes:**
- GCP Managed Instance Group → OCI Instance Pool
- GCP Instance Template → OCI Instance Configuration
- GCP Autoscaler → OCI Autoscaling Configuration

**Criar Instance Pool no OCI:**
```
# 1. Instance Configuration
oci compute instance-configuration create \
  --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleID \
  --display-name "gcp-migrated-config" \
  --instance-details '{
    "compartmentId": "ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleID",
    "shape": "VM.Standard.E4.Flex",
    "shapeConfig": {"ocpus": 2, "memoryInGBs": 8},
    "sourceDetails": {"sourceType": "image", "imageId": "ocid1.image.oc1..exampleID"},
    "createVnicDetails": {"subnetId": "ocid1.subnet.oc1..exampleID"}
  }'

# 2. Instance Pool
oci compute-management instance-pool create \
  --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleID \
  --display-name "migrated-pool" \
  --instance-configuration-id ocid1.instanceconfiguration.oc1..exampleID \
  --size 3 \
  --placement-configurations '[{
    "availabilityDomain": "AD-1",
    "primarySubnetId": "ocid1.subnet.oc1..exampleID"
  }]'

# 3. Autoscaling
oci autoscaling auto-scaling-configuration create \
  --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleID \
  --display-name "pool-autoscale" \
  --instance-pool-id ocid1.instancepool.oc1..exampleID \
  --policies '[{
    "displayName": "scale-up",
    "policyType": "threshold",
    "rules": [{
      "metric": {"metricType": "CPU_UTILIZATION", "threshold": 80},
      "action": {"type": "CHANGE_INSTANCE_COUNT", "value": 1}
    }]
  }]'
```

**Diferenças importantes:**
- GCP: instance groups são zonais ou regionais
- OCI: instance pools são por Availability Domain
- OCI subnets são regionais (span todos os ADs)
- OCI Fault Domains dentro de cada AD

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/managinginstancepools.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Compute Engine to OCI Compute migration.
Como planejar cutover de GCP para OCI Compute?

Planejar cutover GCP → OCI:

**Fase 1: Assessment**
1. Inventory de todas as GCP VMs:
```
gcloud compute instances list --format=table
```
2. Mapear machine types para OCI shapes
3. Documentar dependências

**Fase 2: Preparação OCI**
1. Criar VCN equivalente ao GCP VPC
2. Criar subnets, route tables, security lists
3. Configurar IAM policies

**Fase 3: Migração de dados**
1. Exportar imagens GCP → OCI
2. Migrar persistent disks → Block Volumes
3. Transferir dados de aplicação

**Fase 4: Cutover**
```
# 1. Parar VMs no GCP
gcloud compute instances stop minha-vm --zone us-central1-a

# 2. Sync final
rsync -avz --delete /app/data/ user@oci-instance:/app/data/

# 3. Iniciar instâncias OCI
oci compute instance action \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.oc1..exampleID \
  --action START

# 4. Atualizar DNS
# 5. Validar aplicação
```

**Fase 5: Rollback**
- Manter GCP resources por 48h
- DNS com TTL baixo

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Compute Engine to OCI Compute migration.
Como migrar firewall rules do GCP para Security Lists do OCI?

GCP Firewall Rules → OCI Security Lists / NSGs:

**Diferenças:**
- GCP: firewall rules são aplicadas por tags ou service accounts
- OCI: Security Lists são aplicadas por subnet, NSGs por VNIC

**Exemplo de migração:**

GCP Firewall Rule:
```
gcloud compute firewall-rules create allow-web \
  --allow tcp:80,tcp:443 \
  --source-ranges 0.0.0.0/0 \
  --target-tags web-server
```

OCI Security List equivalente:
```
oci network security-list create \
  --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleID \
  --vcn-id ocid1.vcn.oc1..exampleID \
  --display-name "web-security-list" \
  --ingress-security-rules '[
    {
      "protocol": "6",
      "source": "0.0.0.0/0",
      "tcpOptions": {"destinationPortRange": {"min": 80, "max": 80}},
      "description": "HTTP"
    },
    {
      "protocol": "6",
      "source": "0.0.0.0/0",
      "tcpOptions": {"destinationPortRange": {"min": 443, "max": 443}},
      "description": "HTTPS"
    }
  ]' \
  --egress-security-rules '[{
    "protocol": "all",
    "destination": "0.0.0.0/0"
  }]'
```

**Protocol mapping:**
- TCP: protocol "6"
- UDP: protocol "17"
- ICMP: protocol "1"
- All: protocol "all"

**Alternativa com NSGs:**
```
oci network nsg create \
  --vcn-id ocid1.vcn.oc1..exampleID \
  --display-name "web-nsg"

oci network nsg rules add \
  --nsg-id ocid1.networksecuritygroup.oc1..exampleID \
  --security-rules '[...]'
```

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Network/Concepts/securityrules.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Compute Engine to OCI Compute migration.
Como troubleshootar VM OCI que não boota após migração do GCP?

Para troubleshootar VM que não boota após migração GCP → OCI:

**Passo 1: Console history**
```
oci compute instance get-console-history \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.oc1..exampleID

oci compute instance get-console-history-content \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.oc1..exampleID \
  --console-history-id ocid1.consolehistory.oc1..exampleID
```

**Passo 2: Recovery mode**
```
# Detach boot volume
oci compute boot-volume-attachment detach \
  --boot-volume-attachment-id ocid1.bootvolumeattachment.oc1..exampleID

# Attach como data volume
oci compute volume-attachment attach \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.oc1..recoveryID \
  --volume-id ocid1.bootvolume.oc1..exampleID \
  --type paravirtualized

# Investigar
sudo mount /dev/sdb1 /mnt/recovery
cat /mnt/recovery/var/log/boot.log
cat /mnt/recovery/etc/fstab
```

**Problemas comuns:**

| Sintoma | Causa | Solução |
|---------|-------|--------|
| Kernel panic | Drivers VirtIO faltando | Instalar na VM GCP antes de exportar |
| No bootable device | Formato incompatível | Reexportar como QCOW2 |
| Hang no cloud-init | Configuração incorreta | Verificar cloud.cfg |
| Network não funciona | Network config | Verificar interfaces |

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/accessingconsole.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Compute Engine to OCI Compute migration.
Como migrar startup scripts do GCP para cloud-init no OCI?

GCP startup scripts → OCI cloud-init:

**GCP startup script:**
```
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update
apt-get install -y nginx
systemctl enable nginx
systemctl start nginx
```

**OCI cloud-init equivalente:**
```yaml
#cloud-config
package_update: true
packages:
  - nginx

runcmd:
  - systemctl enable nginx
  - systemctl start nginx
  - echo "Hello from OCI" > /var/www/html/index.html

write_files:
  - path: /etc/myapp/config.yml
    content: |
      database:
        host: 10.0.0.5
```

**Aplicar ao lançar instância:**
```
oci compute instance launch \
  --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleID \
  --shape VM.Standard.E4.Flex \
  --metadata '{"user_data": "'$(base64 -w0 cloud-init.yaml)'"}'
```

**Diferenças:**
- GCP: startup scripts via metadata ou instance template
- OCI: cloud-init via user_data metadata
- Ambos suportam scripts bash e cloud-config
- OCI: logs em `/var/log/cloud-init.log`

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Tasks/userdata.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Compute Engine to OCI Compute migration.
Quais são as principais diferenças entre GCP Compute Engine e OCI Compute?

Principais diferenças entre GCP Compute Engine e OCI Compute:

**1. Modelo de shapes:**
- GCP: machine types fixos (n2-standard-4, etc.)
- OCI: Flex shapes com OCPU e memory independentes

**2. Networking:**
- GCP: VPC global com subnets regionais
- OCI: VCN regional com subnets regionais
- GCP: Firewall rules globais
- OCI: Security Lists por subnet + NSGs por VNIC

**3. Availability:**
- GCP: Regions → Zones
- OCI: Regions → Availability Domains → Fault Domains

**4. Storage:**
- GCP: Persistent Disks (SSD, HDD)
- OCI: Block Volumes com VPUs configuráveis

**5. Pricing:**
- GCP: por segundo, sustained use discounts
- OCI: por segundo, free tier Ampere A1 [MUTABLE]

**6. IAM:**
- GCP: IAM com roles
- OCI: IAM com policies em linguagem natural + Dynamic Groups

**7. Auto-scaling:**
- GCP: Managed Instance Groups
- OCI: Instance Pools + Autoscaling

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Concepts/computeoverview.htm
